name: Space Coast Credit Union | Lago Mar | Miami, FL
description_short: Space Coast Credit Union's Lago Mar branch in Miami offers full-service banking including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with branch and ATM access.
description_long:
Space Coast Credit Union (SCCU) is a federally chartered credit union operating multiple locations throughout Florida, including the Lago Mar branch in Miami. The Lago Mar location serves the Miami community at 7250 SW 157th Ave with comprehensive banking services designed for credit union members. The branch maintains both lobby and drive-thru service with extended hours, providing convenient access for personal and mortgage banking needs.

SCCU Lago Mar offers a full suite of deposit products including multiple checking account types (Free, Interest-Bearing, Student, and Health Savings Checking), various savings options (Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, Christmas Club), and Certificates of Deposit. On the lending side, they provide mortgage products spanning conventional fixed-rate loans, FHA, VA, construction-to-permanent, home equity lines of credit, and refinancing options. Auto lending includes traditional auto loans, refinancing, recreational vehicles, boat and RV loans, and motorcycle financing. The branch also issues SCCU Visa credit cards and offers personal loans secured by share deposits.

The Lago Mar location distinguishes itself through extended drive-thru hours (8 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-1 PM Saturday), safe deposit boxes, a coin sorter, and multiple ATM options including walk-up and deposit-taking machines. As a credit union, SCCU operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than shareholder profit maximization. The institution participates in shared branching networks allowing members to conduct transactions at partner locations throughout the country. Online and mobile banking services, including mobile deposit and Zelle money transfers, provide digital-first options for account management.

For consumers seeking traditional banking services in the Miami area, Space Coast Credit Union Lago Mar represents a conventional option with competitive product offerings and extended service hours. However, potential members should note that credit unions typically have membership eligibility requirements and may have fewer physical locations than major national banks. The Lago Mar branch serves primarily as a service location rather than a specialized lending or alternative finance provider, making it best suited for those seeking established, relationship-based banking.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended drive-thru hours (8 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-1 PM Saturday) for working professionals
Safe deposit boxes available for document and valuables storage at the location
Multiple ATM options including walk-up and deposit-taking machines for convenience
Comprehensive mortgage offerings including no-down-payment and no-closing-cost options
Broad auto lending products including recreational vehicles, boats, and motorcycles
Member-owned credit union structure emphasizes member benefit over shareholder profits
Shared branching network allows transactions at thousands of partner locations nationwide
cons: Credit union membership eligibility requirements may exclude some consumers
Limited Saturday lobby hours (no Saturday lobby service, only drive-thru 9 AM-1 PM)
Fewer physical locations compared to major national banks with multi-state presence
Website requires accessibility toolbar activation and mentions outdated browser issues
No indication of competitive rate advantages over national banks or online-only alternatives
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking full-service banking with extended drive-thru hours
Credit union-eligible members wanting comprehensive mortgage and auto lending products
Consumers preferring member-owned financial institutions over shareholder-driven banks
Individuals needing safe deposit box services alongside banking relationships
diagnosis: Space Coast Credit Union Lago Mar is best for Miami-area consumers who qualify for credit union membership and seek traditional, full-service banking with extended hours and comprehensive lending products. The primary caveat is that credit union eligibility requirements and limited physical location availability make it less accessible than large national banks, and the institution offers no specialized alternative financial services beyond conventional banking.
services: Free Checking and Interest-Bearing Checking Accounts
Student Checking and Health Savings Checking Accounts
Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, Christmas Club, and Youth Savings
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and IRA CDs
Conventional Fixed-Rate Mortgages, FHA, VA, and Jumbo Home Loans
Home Equity Loans and Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC)
Auto Loan Pre-Approval, Auto Loan Refinancing, and Recreational Vehicle Loans
Signature Personal Loans and Share-Secured Loans
Visa Credit Cards (Signature, Platinum, Low Rate, Secured, Student)
Mobile Banking, Online Banking, Digital Wallet, and Mobile Deposit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
